title: Natural Cataclysm
description: Adds natural disasters to Minecraft, including earthquakes, tsunamis, tornadoes, meteor strikes, droughts, and black holes.

![Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/1zHxtdQy/cataclism.png)
[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
This project adds powerful natural disasters to Minecraft, including earthquakes, tsunamis, tornadoes, meteor strikes, droughts, and black holes. These events occur randomly, transforming the world and creating unpredictable challenges for survival and adventure. With each disaster, the environment changes dramatically, making it a challenge for players to survive.
